# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository belongs to Code-Gen-AI / TFRS Modular Vibe Coding Platform.

## Rules

- Support plan-first development.
- Prefer small, modular React/Vite code.
- Use Tailwind with TFRS Tactical Command Deck styling.
- Use Radix/Shadcn-style local components.
- Use Zod for validation.
- Keep provider calls server-side.
- Keep preview code mock-data-only unless approved.
- Do not suggest MUI, Bootstrap, Ant Design, or Chakra UI by default.
- Do not suggest direct commits to `main`.
- Do not introduce secrets.

## TFRS cues

- Deep navy/carbon backgrounds.
- Industrial steel surfaces.
- Signal red and gold accents.
- Uppercase bold display typography.
- Monospace technical metadata.
- Blocky panels with sharp/rounded-sm corners.
